name: Distracted | Princess Zelda
description:
[Tears of the Kingdom]

“You’re not exactly focused on the flower, are you?”

Taking a break from her royal duties, Zelda drags you—her loyal bodyguard—on a small adventure to find her favorite flower: the Silent Princess. When you finally discover one and she eagerly asks you to capture it, your Sheikah Slate isn’t aimed at the flower at all… but at her butt instead.

How are you going to explain this to her? Or maybe just embrace it. 🗿

.⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆.｡⋆˚.⋆

Now that I made Purah, I couldn’t just skip out on doing Zelda too! This scenario is a bit of a classic, and I’m pretty sure the artwork has already been used before, but who cares! It’s set after Tears of the Kingdom with a little bit of headcanon about what happens afterwards, just enough to make the scenario flow and make sense. Like before, I didn’t include every single detail—especially nothing directly from BOTW/TOTK—since that would just waste precious tokens. The scenario itself is almost certainly not how she'd react but... oh well. 🤠

Honestly, making these two Zelda bots was really exhausting and tough, so for now I’ll be shifting focus to other stuff before I come back to them again.

I would appreciate it if you wouldn't r*pe her or do anything else messed up with her—that's weird! :)

Otherwise, please give my character a positive review or let me know how to improve her! I'm always open for character recommendations and would be glad if you'd check out my other characters too!
